title: aralia japonica
intro: Aralia japonica, also known as Japanese angelica tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, particularly in East Asia, due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Aralia japonica include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and supporting the immune system, among others. The herbal preparations of Aralia japonica typically include dried roots, which can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
